title: chore(deps): update dependency @microsoft/api-extractor to ^7.57.6
summary: Renovate bot patch bump of @microsoft/api-extractor from ^7.56.3 to ^7.57.6 in the pnpm workspace catalog. Changes span package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, and pnpm-lock.yaml. The lockfile also picks up a transitive @ast-grep/napi bump from 0.41.0 to 0.41.1. Build passes; changeset check fails as expected for automated dep bumps. Full Test Suite and Observability tests show failures that appear unrelated (pre-existing/flaky). Approved by github-actions bot only — no human review yet.
maintainerNotes: Straightforward Renovate patch bump. CI build passes, and the test failures (Full Test Suite, Observability) are likely pre-existing and unrelated to a lockfile-only change. The changeset check failure is expected for automated dep updates. A pending 7.57.7 version is already noted by Renovate but this PR targets 7.57.6. No human review has been done — only github-actions bot approved. Safe to merge after a quick sanity check.
